title: feuilleea virgultosa
intro: Feuilleea virgultosa, also known as the Dwarf Elm or Small Elm, is a plant species in the family Ulmaceae. It is a small deciduous tree or shrub native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Feuilleea virgultosa include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues, and it is often prepared as a tea or decoction for consumption.
